characters.appearance: Young female, fair complexion, blonde hair parted in the middle. Smooth, symmetrical facial features.
Young female, fair complexion, dark hair pulled back tightly. Expressive facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Maroon knit sweater, gold necklace, and small hoop earrings.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: We need to discuss about the budget [We need to discuss about the budget]
Character A says: Careful, English में हम सिर्फ "discuss the budget" कहते हैं। [Careful, in English we just say "discuss the budget".]
Character B says: OK, let's discuss the budget [OK, let's discuss the budget]
Character B says: I don't understand good this report [I don't understand good this report]
Character A says: इसे ऐसे कहो: "I don't understand this report well." [Say it like this: "I don't understand this report well."]
Character B says: I don't understand this report well [I don't understand this report well]
Character B says: सच बताऊँ? Office में मुझसे रोज़ ऐसी ग़लतियाँ होती हैं। [Honestly? I make mistakes like this every day at the office.]
Character B says: बाकी सब इतने confident लगते हैं, और मुझे बहुत घबराहट होती है। [Everyone else seems so confident, and I feel very nervous.]
Character A says: इसीलिए रोज़ speaking practice करना ज़रूरी है। [That's why doing daily speaking practice is important.]
Character B says: हाँ, पर tutors के लिए मेरे पास time और ज़्यादा पैसे नहीं हैं। [Yes, but I don't have time and a lot of money for tutors.]
Character A says: तो मेरे साथ practice करो, तुम्हारी AI tutor. [Then practice with me, your AI tutor.]
Character A says: मैं हमेशा available हूँ, और तुम्हारी ग़लतियाँ सुधारने में मदद करूंगी। [I am always available, and will help correct your mistakes.]
Character B says: मुझे अपनी job के लिए बस यही चाहिए! [This is exactly what I need for my job!]
Character A says: Supernova download करो और हम रोज़ practice करेंगे। [Download Supernova and we will practice every day.]
Character B says: OK, मैं आज ही Supernova download करती हूँ। [OK, I will download Supernova today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable workplace English mistake.
- Highlights the emotional pain point of feeling nervous around confident colleagues.
- Introduces the AI tutor as an accessible, affordable, and judgment-free solution.
- Ends with a clear call-to-action to download Supernova.

- Provides a clear final call-to-action to download the app.
- Removes aggressive sales tactics to maintain a supportive brand tone.
